headline_seed: Republicans stall votes on partisan ICE funding amid party infighting - NPR
draft_text: Senate Republicans left for Memorial Day recess without passing a ~$70B ICE and Border Patrol bill. The holdup: a $1.8B "Anti-Weaponization Fund" at DOJ. Majority Leader Thune canceled the votes. NBC News and NPR both confirm Trump's June 1 deadline will be missed.
